LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_LastSave: Real-world time of the last game save
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_SaveDiff: Time elapsed since the last game save
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_Source: Data source of the current weather
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_SolarTerm: Current traditional solar term or season simulation
LanguageData.RTRS_ApiNone: None (Disable real weather, use seasonal simulation)
LanguageData.RTRS_CityTooltip: Enter Pinyin or English, e.g., Beijing, London, NewYork
LanguageData.RTRS_UseCelsiusTooltip: Uncheck this to use Fahrenheit instead.
LanguageData.RTRS_DebugModeTooltip: Print detailed logs to the developer console for asynchronous weather updates and variable registrations.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_None: Cannot test: Please select a valid Weather API source above.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_EmptyKey: Cannot test: API Key cannot be empty. Please enter your key.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_Success: Connection Successful! (Ensure there are no errors in the debug log)
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_Fail: Connection Failed! Please open the developer console (Debug Log) for details.
